home.intro_text: I am a passionate developer who specializes in applying Artificial Intelligence to financial business problems. My approach is collaborative, I work directly with business operators to improve existing processes and increase profitability. All my solutions are built to be robust, scalable, and efficient, focusing on clean code and rapid delivery.

paragraphs.p1: I'm a passionate Graduate Engineer specializing in Data Science and AI, with a proven track record of developing innovative, data-driven solutions for complex business problems. From automating financial reporting at BNP Paribas to building predictive models for sustainable engineering, my experience is defined by a commitment to creating efficient, robust, and impactful technical solutions.
paragraphs.p2: My academic journey, combined with practical internships, has equipped me with a strong foundation in AI/ML project lifecycles, from data preparation and model training to deployment and stakeholder communication. I thrive in collaborative environments and am eager to apply my skills to drive profitability and operational efficiency.

graduate_engineer.title: Graduate Engineer - Data Science & AI
graduate_engineer.description: Completed a Master’s Level Engineering degree with a specialization in Data Science and AI, focusing on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, MLOps, and Data Visualization. Ranked in the top 5% of my promotion and graduated as Technical Valedictorian.

internship_bnp.title: Internship - Data Scientist/ML Engineer
internship_bnp.description: Developed AI tools (RAG, NLP) to automate financial analysis and contract assessment. Focused on enhancing productivity and ensuring data integrity for financial reporting teams.

internship_research.title: Internship - Data Science Researcher
internship_research.description: Conducted R&D on predicting properties of eco-concrete using supervised ML models. Authored a comprehensive report in English, demonstrating expertise in scientific research and technical communication.

erasmus.title: Erasmus Semester - Engineering Sciences
erasmus.description: Completed a multidisciplinary program in Engineering Sciences at the Università di Bologna, gaining international exposure and a broader perspective on engineering principles.

it_technician.title: IT Technician
it_technician.description: Provided technical IT support to over 700 people, developing strong problem-solving and communication skills in a professional corporate environment.

project_outro: Ready to build the next big thing?

accidentology.title: Road Accident Severity Prediction
accidentology.subtitle: Applying Data Science to Enhance Traffic Safety

paragraphs.p1: As a student project at ESIEE Paris, I undertook a comprehensive data analysis project focused on a dataset of over 1 million road accidents since 2010. The primary goal was to build a predictive model that could accurately estimate the severity of an accident based on various factors, such as weather conditions, road type, and time of day.
paragraphs.p2: My role involved the entire data science lifecycle, from cleaning and preprocessing the raw data to performing feature engineering to optimize model performance. By applying a range of supervised learning methods, I was able to build a robust model that provides valuable insights into traffic safety, which could inform preventative strategies.

high_accuracy_model.title: High-Accuracy Predictive Model
high_accuracy_model.description: Developed a supervised learning model that achieved an 86% accuracy rate in predicting accident severity, providing a robust tool for traffic safety analysis.

data_driven_insights.title: Data-Driven Insights
data_driven_insights.description: Conducted in-depth analysis on a dataset of over 1 million road accidents, identifying key factors influencing accident severity and providing actionable insights for safety initiatives.

end_to_end_analysis.title: End-to-End Analysis
end_to_end_analysis.description: Managed the full data science lifecycle, from preprocessing and feature engineering to model training and comparison, demonstrating a comprehensive understanding of data analysis workflows.

paragraphs.p1: In the fast-paced world of financial services, preparing for high-stakes investor briefings and executive meetings requires both speed and precision. As an intern at BNP Paribas, I developed RIIF, an intelligent solution that streamlined the process of retrieving and validating key financial data. This work empowered business teams to shift their focus from time-consuming data retrieval to strategic analysis and communication.
paragraphs.p2: My role involved close collaboration with financial reporting teams to understand their workflows and pain points. By building a tool that provides instant, verifiable answers, I helped ensure data integrity while significantly improving preparation time for major corporate events. This project demonstrates my ability to translate complex business needs into effective, secure, and user-centric technical solutions.

increased_productivity.title: Increased Productivity
increased_productivity.description: Automated a critical, manual workflow, allowing teams to accelerate preparation for quarterly financial reports and investor relations meetings.

guaranteed_data_integrity.title: Guaranteed Data Integrity
guaranteed_data_integrity.description: Engineered a secure and compliant AI solution that not only minimized human error but also guarantee the integrity of core business data, ensuring all financial information was consistent and reliable for audit and reporting.

scalable_robust_design.title: Scalable & Robust Design
scalable_robust_design.description: Developed a scalable and maintainable system capable of handling large volumes of internal documents, ensuring long-term operational viability.

tptrm.title: TPTRM: Accelerating Contract Analysis
tptrm.subtitle: An AI Solution for Faster, More Accurate Legal Review

paragraphs.p1: During my internship at BNP Paribas IT Group, I developed a tool to automate contract analysis, a critical and time-consuming process for the legal and compliance teams. This solution, named TPTRM, streamlined the review workflow by automatically parsing documents and highlighting key clauses, significantly reducing manual effort.
paragraphs.p2: My role involved working closely with end-users to understand their pain points and ensure the tool's features directly addressed their needs. By integrating user feedback through workshops and iterative design, I created a solution that not only improved efficiency but also minimized human error and provided a more user-friendly experience. This project demonstrates my ability to build robust and scalable applications that meet complex business requirements.

reduced_review_time.title: Reduced Review Time
reduced_review_time.description: Developed an automated contract analysis tool that cut the average review time by 75%, allowing legal and business teams to focus on critical tasks.

increased_accuracy.title: Increased Accuracy
increased_accuracy.description: Engineered a system to automate subjective tasks, which helped significantly reduce human error and ensure data integrity, thereby minimizing compliance risks.

enhanced_user_experience.title: Enhanced User Experience
enhanced_user_experience.description: Led workshops with end-users and iteratively improved the tool’s design based on feedback, resulting in a highly intuitive and user-centric solution.

research.title: Applied Research: Eco-Concrete
research.subtitle: Leveraging Data Science for Sustainable Engineering

paragraphs.p1: During my internship as a Data Science Researcher at Université Gustave Eiffel & ENPC, I conducted interdisciplinary research on eco-concrete formulation. The project's goal was to leverage machine learning to predict the mechanical properties of concrete, helping to optimize its composition and reduce its carbon footprint by incorporating recycled materials.
paragraphs.p2: My role was to build and validate predictive models from a large dataset. I conducted a comprehensive literature review and applied advanced algorithms like XGBoost and LightGBM to identify the most impactful variables. This work demonstrates my ability to apply a rigorous scientific approach to complex problems, transforming raw data into actionable insights for sustainable engineering.

optimized_material_formulation.title: Optimized Material Formulation
optimized_material_formulation.description: Developed advanced predictive models (XGBoost, LightGBM) to estimate the mechanical properties of eco-concrete, enabling researchers to optimize material composition and reduce environmental impact.

streamlined_research_workflow.title: Streamlined Research Workflow
streamlined_research_workflow.description: Automated data analysis and a literature review process, which accelerated the research cycle and provided a robust framework for testing multiple hypotheses with greater efficiency.

effective_scientific_communication.title: Effective Scientific Communication
effective_scientific_communication.description: Authored a comprehensive technical report in English using LaTeX, effectively communicating complex methodologies and research findings to a broader scientific audience.

facial_recognition.title: Facial Recognition: A Deep Learning Case Study
facial_recognition.subtitle: Building a CNN-based Model from Scratch

paragraphs.p1: As a student at ESIEE Paris, I undertook a project to build an end-to-end facial recognition model using a custom dataset. The challenge was to demonstrate proficiency in every step of a machine learning project, from data preparation to model deployment. I chose a unique and engaging dataset—scenes from "Jurassic Park"—to highlight the process of working with real-world, uncurated data.
paragraphs.p2: This project required me to collect and annotate image data, perform data augmentation, and implement a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for training. The work showcases my practical skills in deep learning, computer vision, and problem-solving, proving my ability to turn a concept into a functional and demonstrable solution.

end_to_end.title: End-to-End Model Development
end_to_end.description: Managed the entire machine learning lifecycle, from custom dataset creation and cleaning to model training and evaluation, demonstrating a comprehensive understanding of the process.

robust_model.title: Robust Model Performance
robust_model.description: Implemented and trained a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for facial recognition, achieving strong performance on a specialized dataset and validating the model's effectiveness.

tech_proficiency.title: Demonstrated Technical Proficiency
tech_proficiency.description: Utilized key libraries like TensorFlow and Keras to build a robust and scalable model, highlighting practical skills in modern deep learning frameworks.
